title: ‘I haven’t seen a thinner laptop than this’: Lenovo’s new Yoga is a marvel of minimalism — and that’s not even the best thing about it
summary: The Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x Gen 11 impresses in many areas. With the new Snapdragon X2 Elite chip equipped, the Yoga Slim 7x Gen 11 is a capable all-round performer.
